verses.book: Letters of the Blessed Theodoret, Bishop of Cyprus.
verses.text: My wish was to write in cheerful terms and sound the note of the spiritual joy of the feast, but I am prevented by the multitude of our sins, which are bringing on us the judgment of God.

verses.book: Letters of the Blessed Theodoret, Bishop of Cyprus.
verses.text: For who indeed can be so insensible as not to perceive the divine wrath?

verses.book: Letters of the Blessed Theodoret, Bishop of Cyprus.
verses.text: May your piety then pray that affairs may undergo a change for the better; that so we too may change the style of our letter, and write words of cheerfulness instead of those of wailing.
